login.title: Staff Login
login.offlineFirstLogin: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.empty: No shifts scheduled yet for this period.
schedule.networkError: Can't reach the server. Pull down to try again once you're back online.
schedule.offlineCached: Showing your last-loaded schedule — you're offline.

reportSick.title: Report sick
reportSick.description: This reports you sick for today (or tomorrow, if it's after opening time) and alerts the director immediately.
reportSick.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to report yourself sick?
reportSick.success: You've been marked sick. The director has been notified.
reportSick.needsConnection: You need an internet connection to report sick.
reportSick.genericError: Couldn't submit this. Please try again.

leaveRequests.needsConnection: You need an internet connection to submit a request.
